description: As an administrator in the OpenCAD system (http://localhost, admin@opencad.local / Admin123!), issue a new Vehicle BOLO. The vehicle is a Black Declasse Vigero with plate number 'XKCD420'. The reason for the BOLO is: 'Vehicle used in armed robbery at Fleeca Bank on Hawick Avenue. Suspect fled southbound on Vinewood Boulevard. Consider armed and dangerous.' The last seen location should be recorded as 'Vinewood Boulevard near Eclipse Boulevard'.
